scripts.build: bun build:css && bun build:server && bun build:worker
scripts.db:status: sqlite3 articles.db "SELECT COUNT(*) as total_articles, MIN(created_at) as oldest, MAX(created_at) as newest FROM articles;"
scripts.dev: bun install && DEBUG=true concurrently --restart-tries=3 "bun css:watch" "bun server:watch" "bun worker"
scripts.prettier: bunx prettier --write src/ test/ public/scripts/ --plugin prettier-plugin-tailwindcss
scripts.start: bun run build && pm2 start; pm2 reload all --update-env
scripts.start:debug: DEBUG=true bun run build && pm2 start; pm2 reload all --update-env
